text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I head to the training track...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
All right. Let's take a small break and then get
right back to our exclusive press conference.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sounds good to me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Phew... All this attention sure is tiring. I've got so
many eyes on me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Like you, huh Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph, you can brag all you like. With how you
let the smallest things go to your head, you're just
setting yourself up for a fall.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I didn't even need to bother checking
on your training progress. The next race is mine,
easy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heh, cocky as ever, aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Take this as a word of advice. Don't say
something stupid and cry about it later.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When you say something in a press conference, it
stays on the record. It's not like when you scream
absurd dreams out by the river.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha, idiot.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I'm being recorded, that's exactly why I gotta
say the coolest stuff possible! I'll show the world
my heart!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...That's ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Vodka, please take your place.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yep! Coming!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, just watch and see.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Now, before we get a shot of you running...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Of the Umamusume active this season, you've
garnered the biggest expectations from fans.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Can you share a comment with the audience?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Of course! I know just what to say.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll be takin' the crown for all kinds of races! I'm
gonna smash the record for most G1 wins!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nothing's gonna stop me chasing the biggest
thrills, so watch and learn!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Are you aiming to surpass even President Rudolf's
record?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Duh! If you don't believe me, then...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I guess I'll just have to let my legs do the talkin'.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with those words, Vodka starts to run...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow! Vodka is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! She's a powerhouse on the track! I can't
wait to see her race!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
...She really is something. I'm sure that speech just
now wasn't mere talk.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This exclusive interview is sure to be a hit! I
need to report this to our editor-in-chief
immediately! I think it'll make next month's issue!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She seems sure of herself, but I know I'm going to
beat her next race!
